name: Fractured Staff of Armadyl
hoverSummary: Tier 95 two-handed magic staff with 1368 ability damage and 2765 accuracy.
detailLines: Two-handed magic weapon with 6-tick speed and range 8.
Passive and special interactions are planned for the dedicated magic mechanics pass.
implementationNotes: Curated endgame magic 2h staff from the live Fractured Staff of Armadyl page. Wiki-verified with Playwright for tier, damage, accuracy, speed, and special attack presence.
